title: Review
subtitle: Control the cost and capacity limits used when Review needs broader coverage.

desktopOnly.title: Desktop only
desktopOnly.description: Review capacity settings are available in the BitFun desktop app. Review is not available on this surface.

capacity.title: Capacity
capacity.description: Limit parallel Review work and how long it may wait for provider capacity.

maxParallelReviewers.label: Max parallel review work
maxParallelReviewers.description: Maximum strict Review work to run at the same time. Higher values may start more model requests in parallel, hit provider rate limits sooner, and increase token spend.

maxQueueWaitSeconds.label: Capacity wait window
maxQueueWaitSeconds.description: How long optional work may wait for provider capacity. Already running checks can make the total review take longer.
